description.en: Install hooks into ~/.claude/settings.json to track Claude Code session state (Working / Waiting / Idle / Error).
description.zh-Hans: 将钩子安装到 ~/.claude/settings.json，用于跟踪 Claude Code 会话状态（工作中 / 等待 / 空闲 / 错误）。

description.en: Enable official Codex hooks by setting features.codex_hooks in ~/.codex/config.toml and installing command hooks in ~/.codex/hooks.json for Working / Idle / Error tracking.
description.zh-Hans: 通过在 ~/.codex/config.toml 中启用 features.codex_hooks，并在 ~/.codex/hooks.json 安装命令钩子，跟踪工作中 / 空闲 / 错误状态。

description.en: Play a cue when an agent starts working, needs your input, or finishes a task. Also expands the Agents Status island briefly on completion.
description.zh-Hans: 当 Agent 开始工作、需要输入或完成任务时播放提示音；完成时还会短暂展开 Agents 状态岛。

description.en: Which bundled sound pack to use for start / needs-input / task-complete cues.
description.zh-Hans: 选择开始、需要输入和任务完成提示使用的内置声音包。
